results.text:
X is hiring deep crypto talent at the product level.

@benjitaylor previously built a self-custody wallet (acquired by Aave in 2023), was CPO at Aave, and later led design for Coinbase’s Base network.

What this signals:

Web2 absorbing Web3 builders
Proven operators (Aave, Base) moving over
Talent shift could slow crypto innovation

Crypto is losing its top product talent to big tech.
